summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HCS (Hedera Consensus Service) blockchain integration. Backend: 15/16 tests passed (93.75%), 1 skipped due to route ordering bug. All core HCS functionality working: topic creation, message submission, document sealing with audit trails.

minor.issue: Route ordering bug - /topics/my is defined AFTER /topics/{topic_id}, so 'my' is treated as a topic_id parameter
minor.fix: Move /topics/my route definition BEFORE /topics/{topic_id} in blockchain_routes.py (line 472 should come before line 168)

action_items: Fix route ordering in blockchain_routes.py - move /topics/my before /topics/{topic_id}
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Real Hedera testnet integration working - topics created on 0.0.* format
Good: HCS topic creation costs ~0.01 HBAR per topic as expected
Good: Messages submitted with sequence numbers tracking correctly
Good: Document sealing with hcs_submitted=true when topic provided
Good: Mirror node integration for topic info retrieval working
Good: Account balance shows ~998 HBAR remaining on testnet account
Fixed: account/balance endpoint was using current_user.role (User model has no role field) - fixed to use database lookup
Bug Found: /topics/my route ordering issue - must be defined before /topics/{topic_id}
seed_data_creation: Multiple HCS topics created during testing on Hedera testnet (0.0.7946367, 0.0.7946418, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) HCS feature fully implemented with real Hedera testnet integration (not mocked). 2) Account 0.0.6534570 is configured with ~998 HBAR. 3) Topics created: 0.0.7946367 and others during testing. 4) Route ordering bug: /topics/my must come before /topics/{topic_id}. 5) Fixed: account/balance endpoint now properly checks admin role via database lookup instead of User model attribute. 6) All endpoints require authentication except /api/blockchain/status.

create_hcs_topic.notes: Creates real HCS topic on testnet, returns topic_id like 0.0.XXXXXXX

submit_topic_message.notes: Submits messages to HCS, returns sequence_number for tracking

get_topic_info.notes: Retrieves topic info and messages from mirror node

seal_document_with_hcs.notes: With session_topic_id, returns hcs_submitted=true and sequence_number

get_my_topics.notes: Route defined after /topics/{topic_id} - 'my' interpreted as topic_id

notarization_auto_topic.notes: Automatically creates HCS topic for audit trail when creating notarization request

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/blockchain/seal (auth no topic) - 200 OK, hcs_submitted may be false
